propositions: Completion-verification emits findings only for failing criteria, so a PASS leaves no durable per-criterion audit record unlike plan and code reviews.
Add a positive per-criterion criteria[] array to CompletionVerdict, each entry holding criterion, met, citation, and kind, riding alongside failures-only findings.
Emit a completion sidecar on PASS (not only FAIL) using a new SCHEMA_PASS = completion_verifier_pass_v1 while keeping the FAIL schema unchanged.
reconcile_verdict must not flip a PASS that carries populated criteria[] but empty findings, and must preserve the array end-to-end.
Thread the verify step's criteria output through the completion_reconcile step via raw_criteria so the close-gate path carries criteria[].
Provide latest_pass_record(ticket_id) schema-guarded to SCHEMA_PASS so PASS records are invisible to latest_fail_verdict.
